title: myroxylon peruiferum
intro: Myroxylon peruiferum, also known as Palo Santo, is a tree species native to the Americas, particularly in Central and South America, and the Caribbean. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, making it a popular choice in aromatherapy and herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo include essential oils, infused teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically, inhaled, or ingested to harness its therapeutic benefits.
